comments.body:
Hello Rajeev,

Thank you for reaching out.

Currently, India Post is not available as a native carrier in the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app.

However, we do support custom carrier integrations through API onboarding. This depends on the availability of shipping APIs from the carrier and feasibility from our development team.

If you’re interested in integrating India Post, please share the API documentation (if available), and we can review it to check the possibilities.

Alternatively, if you are open to suggestions, we can recommend supported carriers in India that offer similar services.

Please let us know how you would like to proceed.

Best regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Rajeev,
 
Thank you for reaching out.
 
Currently, India Post is not available as a native carrier in the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app.
 
However, we do support custom carrier integrations through API onboarding. This depends on the availability of shipping APIs from the carrier and feasibility from our development team.
 
If you’re interested in integrating India Post, please share the API documentation (if available), and we can review it to check the possibilities.
 
Alternatively, if you are open to suggestions, we can recommend supported carriers in India that offer similar services.
 
Please let us know how you would like to proceed.
 
Best regards,
 
Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Bot Response :

Hi Rajeev,

Thank you for sharing the India Post API documentation. We have received both the Google Drive link and the attached onboarding document.

Our team will review the API documentation to assess the feasibility of integrating India Post as a custom carrier. This review typically involves evaluating the available API endpoints for rate calculation, label generation, and tracking to determine what level of integration is possible.

We will get back to you with an update once the review is complete. Please allow our team some time to go through the documentation thoroughly.

Best regards,
Team PluginHive

Bot Response :

Our team will review the API documentation to assess the feasibility of integrating India Post as a custom carrier. This review typically involves evaluating the available API endpoints for rate calculation, label generation, and tracking to determine what level of integration is possible.
 
We will get back to you with an update once the review is complete. Please allow our team some time to go through the documentation thoroughly.
 
Best regards,

comments.body:
Hi Rajeev,

Thank you for sharing the India Post API documentation. We have received both the Google Drive link and the onboarding document.

Our team will review the documentation to check the possibility of integrating India Post as a custom carrier. This includes checking features like rate calculation, label generation, and tracking.

I am also including Abhilash from Partnership team at PluginHive, who will be taking this case forward.

We will reach out to you if we require any further information.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Rajeev,

Thank you for sharing the India Post API documentation and the store details.

Our team has reviewed the initial information, and as we proceed with evaluating the integration, it would be very helpful if you could also share a technical contact person from India Post who can assist us with API-related clarifications if required.

Could you also please share your contact number as well, where we can reach you?

This will help us move forward smoothly with the evaluation and setup.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

Our team has reviewed the initial information, and as we proceed with evaluating the integration, it would be very helpful if you could also share a technical contact person from India Post who can assist us with API-related clarifications if required.
 
Could you also please share your contact number as well, where we can reach you?
 
This will help us move forward smoothly with the evaluation and setup.
 
Looking forward to your response.

Priyanka
